Metadata.title: Lender.cr — Private Lending for Costa Rica Real Estate
Metadata.description: Connect with private investors for asset-backed real estate loans in Costa Rica. Get capital in days, not months — at lower fees than traditional brokers.

HomePage.heroTitle: Private Real Estate Lending, Made Simple
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Get capital against your Costa Rica property in days — or earn 12-16% annual returns on asset-backed loans.
HomePage.borrowerDescription: Get capital against your Costa Rica property in days, not months — at half the cost of traditional brokers.
HomePage.investorDescription: Browse vetted, asset-backed lending opportunities earning 12-16% annually with full transparency.
HomePage.step1Description: Tell us about your property and how much capital you need.
HomePage.step2Description: We calculate your LTV ratio and coordinate an independent appraisal.
HomePage.step3Description: An investor funds your loan. Receive capital within 7-14 days.
HomePage.transparentDescription: Full deal visibility for both borrowers and investors.
HomePage.bilingualDescription: Full English and Spanish support from day one.
HomePage.calculatorSubtitle: Use our free LTV calculator to see if your property qualifies.

Footer.description: Private real estate lending marketplace for Costa Rica.

HowItWorks.borrowersPageDescription: Get capital against your Costa Rica property in days. Here's the step-by-step process.
HowItWorks.investorsPageDescription: Earn 12-16% annual returns on asset-backed real estate loans. Here's how to get started.
HowItWorks.borrowersTitle: Get Capital in Days, Not Months
HowItWorks.borrowersSubtitle: Our streamlined process gets you from application to funding in as little as 7-14 days.
HowItWorks.investorsSubtitle: Browse vetted deals, fund loans, and receive monthly interest payments — all managed for you.
HowItWorks.borrowerStep1Description: Fill out our intake form with your property details, estimated value, loan amount needed, and purpose. Upload your property documents (escritura, plano catastrado, tax receipt).
HowItWorks.borrowerStep2Description: Our platform automatically calculates your preliminary loan-to-value ratio. If your property exists in our database, we pre-populate details for you.
HowItWorks.borrowerStep3Description: We coordinate a professional independent appraisal of your property ($300-500, paid by borrower). This confirms the property value and finalizes your LTV ratio.
HowItWorks.borrowerStep4Description: Once approved, your loan opportunity is listed on our investor marketplace with full details — property photos, LTV ratio, proposed terms, and location.
HowItWorks.borrowerStep5Description: An investor commits capital, legal documents are prepared by our partner notario, the mortgage is registered, and funds are disbursed to you — typically within 7-14 days.
HowItWorks.investorStep1Description: Set up your profile with your investment preferences — minimum/maximum deal size, preferred LTV ratios, regions of interest, and target returns.
HowItWorks.investorStep2Description: Access our marketplace of vetted loan opportunities. Each deal includes property photos, appraisal value, LTV ratio, borrower summary, and proposed interest rate.
HowItWorks.investorStep3Description: Dive deep into any deal — review the independent appraisal, property documents, location context, and borrower profile. All information is transparent and accessible.
HowItWorks.investorStep4Description: Express interest in a deal, confirm your commitment, and transfer funds. Our partner notario handles all legal documentation and mortgage registration.
HowItWorks.investorStep5Description: Sit back and earn monthly interest payments, tracked on your investor dashboard. We handle payment collection, disbursement, and reporting for you.
HowItWorks.viewBorrowerFlow: See how it works for borrowers
HowItWorks.viewInvestorFlow: See how it works for investors

Calculator.pageDescription: Calculate your loan-to-value ratio and see if your Costa Rica property qualifies for private financing.
Calculator.disclaimer: This calculator provides estimates only. Final terms depend on an independent appraisal and underwriting review.
Calculator.whatIsLtvDescription: Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio measures the loan amount as a percentage of the property's appraised value. Lower LTV means less risk for the investor and better rates for you.
Calculator.tierExcellentDescription: 0-30% LTV — Best rates, fastest approval. Strong collateral coverage.
Calculator.tierGoodDescription: 30-40% LTV — Competitive rates with solid collateral.
Calculator.tierStandardDescription: 40-50% LTV — Standard rates. Maximum allowable LTV ratio.
Calculator.tierNotQualifiedDescription: Over 50% LTV — We cannot finance loans above 50% LTV.
Calculator.ctaDescription: Get a preliminary estimate in minutes. Our team will guide you through the full process.

ContactPage.pageDescription: Get in touch with the Lender.cr team. We're here to help borrowers and investors navigate private lending in Costa Rica.

ContactForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
ContactForm.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will get back to you within 24-48 hours.
ContactForm.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ContactForm.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
ContactForm.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

AboutPage.pageDescription: Learn about our mission to modernize private real estate lending in Costa Rica with technology, transparency, and lower fees.
AboutPage.storyText: Lender.cr was born from a personal frustration. Our founder needed bridge capital against a free-and-clear property in Costa Rica — and found that banks take months, traditional brokers charge 8%, and the entire process relies on who you know. There had to be a better way.
AboutPage.missionText: We're building the first technology-driven private lending marketplace for Costa Rica. Our platform brings transparency, standardized processes, and lower fees to a market that has operated on word-of-mouth and manual processes for decades.
AboutPage.ecosystemText: Lender.cr is powered by TicaLuxury's property data and market intelligence. When you need financing for a Costa Rica property, our platforms work together — TicaLuxury for finding properties, Lender.cr for financing them.
AboutPage.value1Description: Every deal comes with full details — property data, LTV ratios, appraisal reports, and clear fee structures. No hidden costs.
AboutPage.value2Description: Close in 7-14 days, not the 3-6 months typical of traditional banks. Time kills deals — we move fast.
AboutPage.value3Description: 4-5% origination fees vs. 8% at competitors. We believe technology should lower costs, not just add a layer.
AboutPage.value4Description: All loans are backed by first-position mortgages with conservative LTV ratios (max 50%). Independent appraisals on every deal.
AboutPage.ctaDescription: Whether you need capital or want to invest, we're here to help.

LendingLocations.heroDescription: Get capital against your {location} property in days. Hard money loans with 12-16% investor returns and conservative LTV ratios.
LendingLocations.calculatorDescription: Enter your property value to see if you qualify for financing in {location}.
LendingLocations.escazuDescription: Escazú is one of Costa Rica's most affluent areas, home to high-value residential properties and a thriving expat community. Strong property values make it ideal for asset-backed lending.
LendingLocations.santaAnaDescription: Santa Ana offers a mix of modern developments and established neighborhoods in the Central Valley. Growing demand from both local and international buyers drives consistent property values.
LendingLocations.guanacasteDescription: Guanacaste is Costa Rica's premier beach and resort destination. Vacation properties, luxury homes, and development lots create diverse lending opportunities.
LendingLocations.tamarindoDescription: Tamarindo is a world-renowned surf town with premium beachfront properties. High tourism demand and international buyer interest support strong collateral values.
LendingLocations.jacoDescription: Jacó is the Central Pacific's most accessible beach town, popular with weekend buyers from San José. A mix of condos, homes, and commercial properties at accessible price points.
